def positive_python_perf_layer_runtime_configuration_profiling_hooks_enabled_by_default():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_runtime_configuration_profiling_hooks_enabled_by_default"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: Build and runtime configuration. Flag cProfile, tracing, or coverage hooks enabled in default runtime paths."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
